name: Believe Jiu Jitsu
title: Contact Us, Believe Jiu Jitsu Summerville South Carolina
description: Contact Believe Jiu Jitsu in Summerville, South Carolina for class schedules, memberships, or general questions. Our team is ready to help.
ogTitle: Contact Us, Believe Jiu Jitsu Summerville South Carolina
paragraphs: 117 N. Creek Dr. unit B Summerville, SC 29486

I’ve been at Believe BJJ since the doors opened, and love this school/community… Professor Randy and family are the most compassionate human beings, and whose efforts in teaching exceed expectations. You’re not just students… You are family. I BELIEVE! 👽 …

Incredible instructors, family friendly, beginner friendly, competitive, all the good things!! Highly highly highly recommend trying this academy for bjj!! The professor and his wife are the kindest, most helpful, encouraging people and you won’t regret it!

I absolutely love it here! As a woman everyone works to make you feel comfortable and included. Professor Randy is an amazing instructor and flavia is so welcoming!! Definitely recommend for anyone even a tiny bit interested in seeing what bjj is about!

The best there is! Both the instruction, care and attention given by Professor Randy, Coach Flavia and the Believe Team is impeccable. My kids love attending their practice, they are learning incredible life long skills and having fun doing it. This is a safe, rewarding and positive environment, wouldn’t go anywhere else!

Our kiddo has been going to Believe Jiu Jitsu since they opened. Professor Randy’s teaching style and ability to meet each child where they are at in their abilities has led to Noah being engaged and committed to class. Noah thrives under the structured but fun teaching style at this gym.

Randy is an outstanding coach! I highly recommend him to anyone in the area. He teaches excellent techniques, and I truly enjoyed every practice I attended. Randy loves the sport of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu. I truly feel his passion in there with every class he teaches. The team at Believe Jiu Jitsu is fantastic. Everyone is incredibly welcoming!
